name: law firms processing 5–15 client intake forms/month tool
description: For law firms processing 5–15 client intake forms/month, manual data entry causes delays in court submissions. We automate document preparation instead of manual data entry and document preparation.
target_audience: law firms processing 5–15 client intake forms/month
problem_solved: Manual conversion of client intake forms into case files is time-consuming and error-prone.

locked_fields.primary_user: law firms processing 5–15 client intake forms/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual conversion of client intake forms into case files is time-consuming and error-prone.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For law firms processing 5–15 client intake forms/month, manual data entry causes delays in court submissions. We automate document preparation instead of manual data entry and document preparation.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual data entry and document preparation

one_liner: For law firms processing 5–15 client intake forms/month, manual data entry causes delays in court submissions. We automate document preparation instead of manual data entry and document preparation.
